name: Jude Torren
description:
It started with one date. You fancied him, as one does, and wanted to pursue him further. He reciprocated that interest, but to a very possessive extent.

Artist Creds: I’ll be so honest this was a pinterest search and I never saw this piece of art ever again.. So whoever you are you’re talented as . kudos 👏👏
